understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Each level required careful manipulation of pieces and obstacles to reach the '+' goals, and the game would report WIN once all goals in the current level were occupied.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece by 3-pixel steps. Some objects like blocks were pushable when adjacent, while walls prevented movement but could sometimes be passed or interacted with in unexpected ways. Multiple selectable pieces existed per level, and CLICK with pixel coordinates switched control between them. The semantic grid provided a simplified view, but actual physics required experimentation as movement_blocked hints were not always reliable.
